name: M142 HIMARS
description: High Mobility Artillery Rocket System — a lightweight, wheeled multiple rocket launcher firing GPS-guided GMLRS rockets and ATACMS ballistic missiles. Proven devastating in combined-arms warfare.

specialAbilities.name: Shoot and Scoot
specialAbilities.description: Rapid displacement after firing prevents counter-battery targeting, greatly improving survivability.

specialAbilities.name: GPS-Guided Rockets
specialAbilities.description: GMLRS rockets achieve sub-meter accuracy at 70+ km range, enabling destruction of point targets with minimal rounds.
